violations.description: Handling of clean equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not handled in a manner to prevent contamination of food-contact surface. -Spoons need to be laying flat in the same direction in the silverware holder.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile missing up front exposing the attic.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tiles missing up front above the ice cream machines exposing the attic.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
